item.title: Why is KKV Agro Powers Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 08 May, KKV Agro Powers Ltd witnessed a notable rise in its share price, climbing 4.89% to close at ₹644.00. This advance outpaced both the broader market and its sector peers, reflecting a robust performance that has attracted investor attention despite some signs of declining participation. Time: 4 hours ago

item.title: Why is Repco Home Finance Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 08 May, Repco Home Finance Ltd witnessed a notable decline in its share price, falling by 2.43% to close at ₹403.70. This movement reflects a combination of short-term market pressures and underlying fundamental factors that have influenced investor sentiment. Time: 4 hours ago

item.title: Why is Dr Lal Pathlabs Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 08 May, Dr Lal Pathlabs Ltd witnessed a significant rise in its share price, closing at ₹1,651.70 with a gain of ₹85.05 or 5.43%. This upward momentum reflects the company’s sustained outperformance relative to both its sector and broader market benchmarks, underpinned by solid fundamentals and investor confidence. Time: 4 hours ago

item.title: Why is Mankind Pharma Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 08-May, Mankind Pharma Ltd’s stock price rose by 2.18% to ₹2,427.15, reflecting robust investor confidence driven by strong financial performance and favourable market dynamics. Time: 4 hours ago

item.title: Has Godrej Consumer Products Ltd declared dividend?
item.description: Yes, Godrej Consumer Products Ltd has declared a dividend of 500% (₹5 per share) with an ex-date of May 12, 2026. While recent total returns have been negative, longer-term returns over 3 to 5 years show positive growth. Time: May 08 2026 11:30 PM IST

item.title: Has Bajaj Auto Ltd. declared dividend?
item.description: Yes, Bajaj Auto Ltd. has declared a dividend of 1500% (₹80 per share) with an ex-date of June 14, 2024. The company has shown strong total returns across various periods, with a 1-year total return of 41.03%. Time: May 08 2026 11:30 PM IST

item.title: Has Sula Vineyards Ltd declared dividend?
item.description: Yes, Sula Vineyards Ltd has declared a 100% dividend, amounting to ₹3.6 per share, with an ex-date of May 23, 2025. However, the stock has experienced significant negative returns over various periods, despite the dividend yield of 2.04%. Time: May 08 2026 11:30 PM IST

item.title: Has Aptus Value Housing Finance India Ltd declared dividend?
item.description: Yes, Aptus Value Housing Finance India Ltd has declared a dividend of 125% (₹2 per share) with an ex-date of May 15, 2026. While the dividend yield is 1.63%, total returns over various periods have been mixed, with some showing negative performance despite the dividend payouts. Time: May 08 2026 11:30 PM IST
